name: Avetta (formerly BROWZ) Contractor Compliance API
what_it_does: Avetta (formerly BROWZ) contractor and supplier compliance REST API for contractor prequalification, insurance certificate management, safety compliance verification, and supply chain risk management. Enables AI agents to manage contractor prequalification status retrieval for vendor onboarding automation, handle insurance certificate verification and expiration monitoring for continuous compliance, access safety record and EMR (Experience Modification Rate) retrieval for EHS risk assessment, retrieve contractor training record and credential verification for workforce compliance automation, manage supplier risk scoring and compliance dashboard for supply chain oversight, handle audit result and corrective action tracking for compliance remediation workflow, access workforce and subcontractor management for tier 2 supply chain visibility, retrieve compliance alert and expiration notification for proactive compliance maintenance, manage onboarding workflow automation for contractor registration and approval, and integrate Avetta with procurement systems (SAP Ariba, Oracle, Coupa) and EHS platforms.
use_cases: Verifying contractor compliance from vendor onboarding agents
Monitoring insurance expiration from compliance automation agents
Assessing contractor safety records from EHS risk agents
Managing supplier qualification from procurement agents
not_for: Employee background checks (use FCRA-compliant consumer CRA)
Full procurement and PO management (use Ariba or Coupa)
Real-time job site safety monitoring (use IoT/wearables platforms)
best_when: An enterprise buyer organization wanting AI agents to automate contractor prequalification, insurance certificate monitoring, safety compliance verification, and supply chain risk management for contractor-heavy operations in construction, energy, manufacturing, and utilities.
avoid_when: INSURANCE CERTIFICATE VERIFICATION ACCURACY: Automated insurance certificate status from Avetta reflects submitted documents and third-party verification; automated contractor approval based on insurance status without direct insurer verification may miss policy cancellations or lapses between submission cycles. FCRA COMPLIANCE FOR EMPLOYMENT PURPOSES: Avetta contractor safety and prequalification data used in individual contractor worker employment decisions may trigger FCRA obligations; consult legal counsel on FCRA applicability for contractor vs supplier entity distinction. OSHA 300 LOG DATA ACCURACY: Automated EMR and safety record retrieval from Avetta depends on contractor-submitted OSHA data; automated safety decisions on unverified EMR data create risk of decisions based on underreported incident rates. GDPR CONTRACTOR WORKER DATA: Automated processing of EU contractor worker personal data (training records, credentials) through Avetta requires lawful basis and data subject rights compliance; automated EU personal data processing without GDPR lawful basis creates regulatory exposure.

auth.notes: Avetta uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. South Jordan, Utah HQ. BROWZ was founded 2001 in Salt Lake City; acquired by Avetta 2019. Avetta has 500+ enterprise buyers and 120,000+ contractors globally. Energy, construction, manufacturing, utilities verticals. Competes with ISNetworld and Veriforce (formerly PEC Safety/ComplyWorks) for contractor compliance and prequalification management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — contractor subscription + buyer platform fee
pricing.paid_tiers: Buyer platform annual subscription; contractors pay per-year fee for Avetta membership; API access in enterprise tier
pricing.notes: South Jordan UT. Private, PE-backed. Avetta acquired BROWZ 2019. 500+ enterprise buyers, 120,000+ contractors. Dual-sided marketplace pricing. Buyer platform fee + contractor membership fee.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; batch endpoints for bulk contractor status retrieval

known_agent_gotchas: INSURANCE CERTIFICATE LAG — NOT REAL-TIME INSURER VERIFICATION: Avetta insurance certificate status reflects submitted documents and third-party verification cycle, not real-time insurer status; automated contractor approval based on Avetta certificate status may miss policy cancellations between verification cycles; supplement with direct insurer verification for high-risk contractor engagement

BROWZ-TO-AVETTA MIGRATION API CHANGES: BROWZ was rebranded to Avetta after 2019 acquisition; existing BROWZ API integrations may require endpoint migration; verify current API domain and authentication endpoint with vendor if migrating from legacy BROWZ integration

Contractor-submitted safety data accuracy — EMR and OSHA 300 log data in Avetta is contractor-submitted and subject to underreporting; automated safety scoring on unverified incident rate data creates risk of decisions on artificially low EMR scores; supplement with insurer EMR verification for critical contractors

GDPR contractor worker credential data — automated processing of EU contractor worker personal data (training certificates, credentials) requires GDPR lawful basis; Avetta EU data is stored in EU region but automated buyer access to EU worker data requires buyer-side lawful basis documentation

Dual-sided platform pricing for API access — Avetta API access requires both buyer platform subscription and contractors must be enrolled Avetta members; automated onboarding workflows must account for contractor membership enrollment latency (days to weeks) before compliance data is available

Compliance status staleness window — Avetta contractor compliance status is updated on document submission and verification cycle, not continuously; automated real-time compliance gate may return stale status for contractors between renewal cycles; implement last-verified timestamp check for time-sensitive contractor dispatch
agent_readiness.security_notes: Contractor compliance. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/AU. Contractor safety, insurance, and credential data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Contractor compliance. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/AU. Contractor safety records and insurance data.
